programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. But now Buddy is playing football, too, thanks to veterinarian Patrick Sullivan (Gregory Harrison), who happens to be the new boyfriend of Josh's mom. programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th President of the United States.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Wrong Husband
programme.desc: After a mysterious death, Kaujak and Sapa are separated despite being promised to each other at birth. With the help of spirit guides, efforts are made to restore harmony.

programme.title: Kill 'Em All 2
programme.desc: A retired spy and his long-lost daughter are living peacefully off the grid in Italy. When their whereabouts are discovered by the vengeful brother of their previous target, they must do whatever it takes to escape from his army of thugs.

programme.title: Ferrari
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, bankruptcy looms over the company that Enzo Ferrari and his wife built 10 years earlier. He decides to roll the dice and wager it all on the iconic Mille Miglia, a treacherous 1,000-mile race across Italy.

programme.title: In a Violent Nature
programme.desc: When a group of teens takes a locket from a collapsed fire tower in the woods, they unwittingly resurrect the rotting corpse of Johnny, a vengeful spirit spurred on by a horrific 60-year-old crime. The undead killer soon embarks on a bloody rampage to retrieve the stolen locket, methodically slaughtering anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: At the age of six, director Kent Donguines' mother leaves him and his family in the Philippines to become a nanny overseas. Now an adult, he shares the stories of several Filipina caregivers in Vancouver, bearing witness to their sacrifice as they struggle to reunite with their children. Kent maps out the emotional landscape and trauma of migrant labor.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. Their new friend, April O'Neil, helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: GOAT
programme.desc: A small goat named Will gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball -- a high-intensity, full-contact sport that's dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Ridiculed by his teammates, Will becomes determined to revolutionize the sport and prove that "small can ball!".

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
